title: centaurea pulmonariifolia
intro: Centaurea pulmonariifolia, also known as the lungwort or mountain centaury, is a flowering plant species in the genus Centaurea. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia, due to its high content of mucilages and saponins. The health benefits of Centaurea pulmonariifolia include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which help to soothe and clear the lungs. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to alleviate coughs, colds, and other respiratory ailments.
